title: Temporal/lookahead leakage check (no post-baseline/outcome-derived predictors) added to audit
context: Survival benchmarks have a specific leakage mode not present in subtyping: temporal/lookahead leakage — using post-baseline information (measurements taken after the study baseline) or features derived from the outcome itself (e.g. treatment response used to predict survival) as predictors. This is a known source of inflated survival model performance in published studies. This check extends the leakage-audit suite (audit-008) with a temporal/lookahead check for the survival benchmark (survival-012). It follows the same golden-fixture pattern: a deliberately-leaky fixture (containing a post-baseline feature) must trigger the check and fail CI.
objective: Add the temporal/lookahead leakage check to the leakage-audit suite: flag any predictor feature derived from post-baseline information or from the outcome variable itself; fail CI on any violation; commit a golden leaky fixture demonstrating the check works (a feature set containing a known post-baseline or outcome-derived variable) and a clean fixture that passes.
acceptanceCriteria: The temporal/lookahead check flags any predictor feature that is derived from post-baseline information (measurements taken after the survival study baseline date) and fails CI on detection

The check flags any predictor feature that is derived from or encodes the outcome variable (e.g. a treatment response variable used to predict the survival outcome that treatment was meant to improve)
A golden leaky fixture is committed: a feature set containing at least one known post-baseline or outcome-derived feature that triggers the check and fails CI
A golden clean fixture is committed: a feature set with only baseline-time predictors that passes the check
The temporal check is integrated into the full audit suite (audit-008 extended) and runs in CI on every push for any survival benchmark
Technical reviewer and domain reviewer confirm the check correctly captures the temporal leakage pattern
output: A merged PR adding the temporal/lookahead leakage check to the audit suite with golden clean and leaky fixtures and CI integration — closing the survival-specific leakage vector.
